main.description: Mint a short-lived subscription ticket for the given topic. The caller's access is checked and — for `community:<did>` topics — expanded to the concrete list of `space:<uri>` topics the caller can see. Server-side callers may skip tickets and use their JWT directly on `.subscribe`.

topic.description: Requested topic. One of `space:<uri>`, `community:<did>`, `actor:<did>` (self-only in v1).

ticket.description: HMAC-signed opaque token. Passed as `?ticket=` on `.subscribe`.

topics.description: Concrete delivery topics authorized by this ticket.
